title: Bind RplStack generation to RplRuntime in runtime_poll/receive/complete methods
description: Add generation tracking to RplStack (monotonic u64, incremented on construction/reset/provision). Wire generation into runtime_poll, runtime_receive, runtime_complete_trickle_* and related outcomes/errors. Enforce single-owner by tying runtime lifetime/validity to current stack generation. Update callsites in maintain, tests.
